mapper.select: select id, skillid as skillId, passrate as passRate, number, number as questionCount, passnumbers as passNumbers, createtime as create_time, `level`, `name` as title from rc_question.problemsets_table

SELECT rc_question.multiple_choice_table.id as uuid, rc_question.multiple_choice_table.describe as content, rc_question.multiple_choice_table.op_one, rc_question.multiple_choice_table.op_two, rc_question.multiple_choice_table.op_three, rc_question.multiple_choice_table.op_four, rc_question.multiple_choice_table.op_answer, rc_question.multiple_choice_table.analysis, rc_question.multiple_choice_table.tags, rc_question.multiple_choice_table.question_type FROM rc_question.multiple_choice_table JOIN rc_question.problemsets_question_table ON rc_question.problemsets_question_table.qid = rc_question.multiple_choice_table.id WHERE rc_question.problemsets_question_table.pid = #{questionSetId} order by rc_question.multiple_choice_table.question_type

SELECT rc_personal.skill_table.id as tagId, rc_personal.skill_table.content as tag FROM rc_personal.skill_table left JOIN rc_question.skill_problemset_table ON rc_question.skill_problemset_table.skiiId = rc_personal.skill_table.id left JOIN rc_question.problemsets_table ON rc_question.skill_problemset_table.problemsetId = rc_question.problemsets_table.id WHERE rc_question.problemsets_table.id = #{id}

SELECT rc_question.multiple_choice_table.op_answer FROM rc_question.multiple_choice_table JOIN rc_question.problemsets_question_table ON rc_question.problemsets_question_table.qid = rc_question.multiple_choice_table.id WHERE rc_question.problemsets_question_table.pid = #{questionSetId} ORDER BY rc_question.multiple_choice_table.question_type
SELECT * FROM rc_question.problemsets_user_table WHERE rc_question.problemsets_user_table.pid = #{questionSetId} and rc_question.problemsets_user_table.userid = #{currentUserId}
mapper.insert:
insert into rc_question.problemsets_user_table( pid, id, userid, createtime, passRate ) values( #{ProblemSetId}, #{id}, #{userId}, #{createTime}, #{passRate}
)
mapper.select: SELECT rc_question.multiple_choice_table.analysis FROM rc_question.problemsets_question_table JOIN rc_question.multiple_choice_table ON rc_question.problemsets_question_table.qid = rc_question.multiple_choice_table.id WHERE rc_question.problemsets_question_table.pid = #{questionSetId}

SELECT rc_question.multiple_choice_table.id FROM rc_question.multiple_choice_table JOIN rc_question.problemsets_question_table ON rc_question.problemsets_question_table.qid = rc_question.multiple_choice_table.id WHERE rc_question.problemsets_question_table.pid = #{questionSetId} order by rc_question.multiple_choice_table.question_type
mapper.insert:
insert into rc_question.mistake_table( id, questionid, create_time, error_choice, type, analysis, right_choice
) value ( #{id}, #{questionId}, #{create_time}, #{errorChoice}, #{type}, #{analysis}, #{rightChoice} )
mapper.select: SELECT rc_question.mistake_table.analysis, rc_question.mistake_table.create_time, rc_question.mistake_table.error_choice, rc_question.mistake_table.id, rc_question.mistake_table.questionid, rc_question.mistake_table.right_choice, rc_question.mistake_table.type FROM rc_question.mistake_table JOIN rc_question.mistake_user_table ON rc_question.mistake_table.id = rc_question.mistake_user_table.mistakeId WHERE rc_question.mistake_user_table.userId = #{currentUserId}
SELECT count(*) FROM rc_question.mistake_user_table WHERE rc_question.mistake_user_table.mistakeId = #{id} and rc_question.mistake_user_table.userId = #{userId}

select id, skillid as skillId, passrate as passRate, number, passnumbers as passNumbers, createtime as create_time, `level`, `name` as title from rc_question.problemsets_table where id = #{questionSetId}

select id, skillid as skillId, passrate as passRate, number, number as questionCount, passnumbers as passNumbers, createtime as create_time, `level`, `name` as title from rc_question.problemsets_table
`level` = #{level}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM rc_question.mistake_user_table WHERE userId = #{currentUserId} and mistakeid = #{questionId}
mapper.select:
SELECT rc_question.multiple_choice_table.id as uuid, rc_question.multiple_choice_table.describe as content, rc_question.multiple_choice_table.op_one, rc_question.multiple_choice_table.op_two, rc_question.multiple_choice_table.op_three, rc_question.multiple_choice_table.op_four, rc_question.multiple_choice_table.op_answer, rc_question.multiple_choice_table.analysis, rc_question.multiple_choice_table.tags, rc_question.multiple_choice_table.question_type, rc_question.mistake_table.error_choice
FROM rc_question.multiple_choice_table JOIN rc_question.mistake_table ON rc_question.multiple_choice_table.id = rc_question.mistake_table.questionid JOIN rc_question.mistake_user_table ON rc_question.mistake_user_table.mistakeId = rc_question.mistake_table.id WHERE rc_question.mistake_user_table.userId = #{currentUserId} order by rc_question.multiple_choice_table.question_type

SELECT rc_question.multiple_choice_table.id as uuid, rc_question.multiple_choice_table.describe as content, rc_question.multiple_choice_table.op_one, rc_question.multiple_choice_table.op_two, rc_question.multiple_choice_table.op_three, rc_question.multiple_choice_table.op_four, rc_question.multiple_choice_table.op_answer, rc_question.multiple_choice_table.analysis, rc_question.multiple_choice_table.tags, rc_question.multiple_choice_table.question_type, rc_question.mistake_table.error_choice
FROM rc_question.multiple_choice_table JOIN rc_question.mistake_table ON rc_question.multiple_choice_table.id = rc_question.mistake_table.questionid JOIN rc_question.mistake_user_table ON rc_question.mistake_user_table.mistakeId = rc_question.mistake_table.id WHERE rc_question.mistake_user_table.userId = #{currentUserId} and rc_question.mistake_table.questionid = #{questionId} order by rc_question.multiple_choice_table.question_type
